llcFilesWith: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation (Trade Name Application)
soleProprietorFilesWith: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation (the same statewide trade name registration applies to individuals and sole proprietors)
feeBasis: The SDAT fee to register a trade name is $25.
renewalRule: A trade name filing is effective for five years from the date SDAT accepts it and may be renewed for successive five-year terms.
protectionNote: A Maryland trade name is a disclosure filing; SDAT registration does not by itself grant an exclusive right to the name.
searchNote: Registered trade names appear in the Maryland Business Express entity search.
notes: Maryland registers trade names statewide through the State Department of Assessments and Taxation (§ 1-406). LLCs and sole proprietors alike file a Trade Name Application for $25; the filing lasts five years and renews for like terms. There is no publication requirement, and registration is disclosure rather than a trademark, so it does not by itself grant exclusive rights.

sources.citation: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation
sources.title: Trade Name Application (SDAT, $25, 5-year term)
